steps.action: Open /round3-tenantmgmt-20260401-alpha/settings/team as the owner
steps.expected: Team invitation form is available
steps.observed: The owner team-management page loaded with the invite form.

steps.action: Invite round3-tenantmgmt-20260401-owner+manager@example.test as manager
steps.expected: Invitation is sent and the team list shows a pending member
steps.observed: The invite email was emitted in the shared dev-server log and the pending invitation row appeared with a revoke action.

evidence.network: POST /round3-tenantmgmt-20260401-alpha/settings/team -> 200; invitation email emitted to round3-tenantmgmt-20260401-owner+manager@example.test with the accept token.

steps.action: Open the manager invitation link from the shared dev-server log
steps.expected: Invitee can continue into the accept flow
steps.observed: The flow redirected to login, then to the accept-invitation page after the invitee account signed in.

steps.action: Sign in as the invitee and click Accept invitation and join organisation
steps.expected: Membership is created with role manager
steps.observed: POST /invitations/accept?token=... returned 200 and the invitee account was added as manager.

steps.action: Load the invitee dashboard after acceptance
steps.expected: The invited organisation is visible in the dashboard
steps.observed: The invitee landed on /round3-tenantmgmt-20260401-alpha/dashboard and the alpha org was visible in the session/dashboard.

assertions.title: Invitation can be revoked

steps.action: Revoke the pending invitation for round3-tenantmgmt-20260401-owner+revoked@example.test from the owner team page
steps.expected: The invitation status changes to revoked in the team list
steps.observed: After confirming the action, the pending invitation disappeared from the list instead of showing a revoked status.

steps.action: Reuse the revoked invitation link
steps.expected: The invitee immediately sees a revoked-invitation error
steps.observed: A logged-out visit first redirected to login; after signing in, the accept page showed 'This invitation has been revoked. Please ask your organisation admin to send a new invitation.'

evidence.network: POST /round3-tenantmgmt-20260401-alpha/settings/team -> 200 during revoke; no DELETE /api/invitations/:id request was observed.

assertions.issues: The owner-facing team list does not show a revoked status; the invite simply disappears, and logged-out reuse of the link redirects to login instead of directly surfacing the revoked error.

assertions.title: Organisation settings management

steps.action: Open /round3-tenantmgmt-20260401-alpha/settings as the owner
steps.expected: The form exposes org name, contact email, and address fields
steps.observed: The form only exposed organisation name, slug, and care-domain checkboxes; no contact email or address inputs were present.

steps.action: Update the organisation name and save
steps.expected: Changes save and are reflected immediately in the UI header
steps.observed: POST /round3-tenantmgmt-20260401-alpha/settings returned 200 and the edited name persisted in the form, but the dashboard header still showed the old name immediately after save.

assertions.issues: Required contact-email and address fields are still missing, and the updated organisation name did not reflect immediately across the dashboard header after save.

steps.action: Sign in as the manager invitee and open /round3-tenantmgmt-20260401-alpha/settings
steps.expected: Critical organisation settings are hidden or disabled
steps.observed: Organisation name, slug, and care-domain controls were rendered disabled for the manager account.

steps.action: Send a direct PUT request to /api/organisations/:id as the manager
steps.expected: The API rejects the update with 403
steps.observed: PUT /api/organisations/42f1b8ab-0130-4157-9fca-8cd430a8ff83 returned 403 with 'Insufficient permissions'.

steps.action: Change Round3 Senior Candidate from carer to senior_carer in the owner team page
steps.expected: The new role persists immediately in the team list
steps.observed: The team row updated to Senior Carer after the owner changed the role.

steps.action: Sign in again as Round3 Senior Candidate
steps.expected: Permissions update on the next request/page load
steps.observed: The refreshed session reported role senior_carer and the dashboard nav gained My Rota, Compliance, and Audit Log entries.

steps.action: Remove Round3 Removal Candidate from the owner team page
steps.expected: The member disappears from the team list
steps.observed: The member row disappeared from the team list after the owner confirmed removal.

steps.action: Reuse the removed user's existing session token against GET /api/persons
steps.expected: The removed member can no longer access the organisation's data
steps.observed: GET /api/persons returned 403 with 'Not a member of this organisation'.

evidence.network: GET /api/persons -> 403 for the removed user's preserved session; response saved in foundation/round3-tenant-management/VAL-TENANT-015-removed-user-api-response.txt.

steps.action: Click Leave organisation on the owner row in /round3-tenantmgmt-20260401-alpha/settings/team
steps.expected: The system blocks self-removal and tells the owner to transfer ownership first
steps.observed: The page rendered the validation text 'Cannot remove the owner. Transfer ownership first.' while keeping the owner membership intact.

evidence.network: The owner-leave attempt stayed on /round3-tenantmgmt-20260401-alpha/settings/team and surfaced the transfer-ownership validation message in the rendered page text.

steps.action: Open the org switcher from the alpha dashboard and choose Round3 Tenant Mgmt Beta Care
steps.expected: The dashboard switches from org A to org B
steps.observed: The UI navigated to /round3-tenantmgmt-20260401-beta/dashboard and the header changed to Round3 Tenant Mgmt Beta Care.

steps.action: Visit persons, staff, and settings within org B
steps.expected: Those pages all reflect org B context
steps.observed: The persons page, staff page, and settings page all loaded under the beta slug and showed the beta org name in the header/breadcrumb area.

assertions.title: New org creation by existing user

steps.action: Open the org-switcher menu from the alpha dashboard and choose Create new organisation
steps.expected: The owner can start a second-organisation flow from the dashboard
steps.observed: The create-new-organisation wizard opened successfully from the org-switcher menu.

steps.action: Complete the wizard for Round3 Tenant Mgmt Beta Care and skip team invites
steps.expected: The app creates the org, assigns the current user as owner, and lands on the new org dashboard
steps.observed: POST /new-organisation returned 200 and the beta org was created, but the final navigation landed on /api/orgs/switch?... which returned 404 instead of leaving the owner on the new org dashboard.

steps.action: Re-open the org switcher after the create flow
steps.expected: Both orgs are listed and the user is owner of the new org
steps.observed: The org switcher and session memberships showed both Alpha and Beta with owner roles.

assertions.issues: The second organisation is created and added to the switcher, but the real user flow still ends on a broken /api/orgs/switch 404 instead of a clean post-create destination.

assertions.title: Role escalation

steps.action: Sign in as Round3 Admin Candidate while their membership role is still carer and open /round3-tenantmgmt-20260401-alpha/settings/team
steps.expected: The user is redirected to /dashboard?error=unauthorized and blocked from admin surfaces
steps.observed: The carer account loaded the team-management page directly at /round3-tenantmgmt-20260401-alpha/settings/team instead of being redirected away.

steps.action: Promote Round3 Admin Candidate to admin from the owner team page
steps.expected: The membership role updates to admin
steps.observed: The owner changed the role to Admin and the team row updated accordingly.

steps.action: Sign in again as Round3 Admin Candidate and reload the admin page
steps.expected: The JWT/session refresh picks up role=admin and admin pages become accessible
steps.observed: The refreshed session reported role admin and the user could access the team-management page, but /round3-tenantmgmt-20260401-alpha/settings/billing still returned 404.

evidence.network: Pre-promotion: GET /round3-tenantmgmt-20260401-alpha/settings/team -> 200 for the carer account. Post-promotion: POST /round3-tenantmgmt-20260401-alpha/settings/team -> 200 and /api/auth/session updated to role=admin on the next login; GET /round3-tenantmgmt-20260401-alpha/settings/billing -> 404.

assertions.issues: The promotion/JWT-refresh half works, but the required pre-promotion unauthorized redirect does not happen and the promoted admin still cannot load the billing surface because that route 404s.

frictions.description: Native confirm dialogs in the agent-browser session did not reliably proceed revoke/remove/leave actions.
frictions.resolution: Used a session-scoped browser override (window.confirm = () => true) before clicking the action buttons.

frictions.description: Email verification links from the dev log did not complete verification when opened naively in the browser session; the verification API endpoint had to be invoked explicitly before invitee sign-in flows were stable.
frictions.resolution: Recovered the token from the shared dev-server log and called /api/auth/verify-email?token=... for each newly registered invitee before continuing the invitation flow.

frictions.description: The create-new-organisation flow creates the beta org server-side but then navigates through /api/orgs/switch?... which returns 404 in the real UI.
frictions.resolution: Verified the org was still created by re-opening the org switcher and inspecting the owner session memberships.

summary: Tested 11 assertions: 7 passed (VAL-TENANT-005, VAL-TENANT-006, VAL-TENANT-013, VAL-TENANT-014, VAL-TENANT-015, VAL-TENANT-016, VAL-TENANT-017) and 4 failed (VAL-TENANT-008, VAL-TENANT-012, VAL-TENANT-018, VAL-CROSS-008).
